name: Authorization Gate Receiver
description: Listens for AUTHORIZE MASTER ORCHESTRATOR from CEO via Slack or email. On receipt, activates Atlas Step 10, flips WF-1 through WF-7 live, routes Worker to production, and notifies sales team.

config.code: const authorizedEmails = ['david@coastalkey-pm.com']; const senderEmail = inputData.sender_email; if (!authorizedEmails.includes(senderEmail)) { throw new Error('Unauthorized sender: ' + senderEmail); } output = { authorized: true, sender: senderEmail, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() };

config.description: Activate Atlas Step 10 for Module A
Route Cloudflare Worker to production Nemotron endpoint

config.message: MASTER ORCHESTRATOR AUTHORIZED by {{step1.sender}} at {{step1.timestamp}}. All modules live. Atlas Step 10 active. Workflows WF-1 through WF-19 enabled. Production inference routing confirmed.
Project Sentinel is LIVE. Atlas dialing activated. All segments armed. Begin outbound operations.

config.subject: Master Orchestrator Authorized - All Systems Live
config.body:
David,

Master Orchestrator authorization confirmed at {{step1.timestamp}}.

Activated:
- Module A: Project Sentinel (Atlas Step 10)
- Module B: Social Automation (Buffer connected)
- Module C: Content Production Engine
- Workflows WF-1 through WF-19
- Nemotron production inference routing

Coastal Key AI Operations are fully live.

Coastal Key Property Management LLC

note: This workflow is always active. It gates all other activations.
